tracks.title: The Hand That Feeds
tracks.reason: Its driving, relentless 4/4 drum and bass pattern at a similar tempo is the ideal foundation for the core groove of THE ANVIL and THE SUBSTRATE.
tracks.search_terms: nine inch nails the hand that feeds midi

tracks.title: Pursuit
tracks.reason: The simple, aggressive, and highly rhythmic monophonic lead provides a perfect model for the energy and phrasing of THE SPARK's counter-melody.

tracks.title: The Black Block
tracks.reason: The track's complex, syncopated rhythmic interplay and use of shifting percussive layers is a direct parallel for our 4/4 vs 15/16 polyrhythm.
